title: SETC Configuration
description: Schema for SETC (Security Exploit Telemetry Collection) configuration files. Each config is an array of exploit entries targeting vulnerable Docker containers.

items.title: Exploit Entry
items.description: A single exploit entry defining a target and the Metasploit exploit to run against it.

name.title: CVE / Exploit Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this entry, typically a CVE ID (e.g. CVE-2021-42013).

settings.title: Exploit Settings
settings.description: Configuration for the target environment and Metasploit exploit.

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of the vulnerability or exploit.

exploit.title: Metasploit Exploit Module
exploit.description: Metasploit module path (e.g. multi/http/struts2_multi_eval_ognl). Omit or leave empty for manual exploit mode.

target_image.title: Target Docker Image
target_image.description: Docker image containing the vulnerable service (single-container mode).

yml_file.title: Docker Compose File
yml_file.description: Path to docker-compose YAML for multi-container targets. Supports $SETC_PATH and $VULN_PATH env vars.

target_name.title: Target Container Name
target_name.description: Name of the target container within the docker-compose environment.

exploit_options.title: Metasploit Options
exploit_options.description: Additional MSF console commands (e.g. 'set PAYLOAD cmd/unix/reverse_bash;set RPORT 9080;').

exploit_success_pattern.title: Exploit Success Pattern
exploit_success_pattern.description: Regex pattern to detect successful exploitation in MSF output.

target_delay.title: Target Startup Delay
target_delay.description: Seconds to wait after starting the target container before exploitation. Default: 0.

exploit_retries.title: Exploit Retries
exploit_retries.description: Number of times to retry the exploit before giving up. Default: 4.

exploit_check_delay.title: Exploit Check Delay
exploit_check_delay.description: Seconds between status checks during exploit execution. Default: 3.

exploit_check_count.title: Exploit Check Count
exploit_check_count.description: Number of status checks per exploit attempt. Default: 7.

ready_delay.title: Ready Check Delay
ready_delay.description: Seconds to wait between target readiness checks. Default: 5.

ready_retries.title: Ready Check Retries
ready_retries.description: Number of readiness checks before giving up. Default: 5.

oneOf.title: Single Container Target
oneOf.description: Use a single Docker image as the vulnerable target.

oneOf.title: Docker Compose Target
oneOf.description: Use a docker-compose file to set up a multi-container target environment.
